programmes.show_description: A makeup manufacturer gets her big shot when she teams up with an investment executive, but can she keep the magic that made her product a success? Perhaps with love, she will. (2023)
When a friend's winery sees a murder, Ainsley's crime-solving skills prove invaluable as she teaches criminology and investigates the case. (2024)
Small-town pie shop owner Kate meets city boy Drew, who plans to tear down her business to build a neighbourhood of new homes. Can her love - and her pies - win him over? (2023)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Lilly, a hopeless romantic and literary enthusiast, is surprised when her wish to talk to her favourite author comes true and Jane Austen herself appears in her life. (2024)
Stella designs hats and fascinators for socialite Rosalind and meets her son Christian who's training a horse to compete in the Louisville Derby. (2025)
When her older sister elopes with a non-royal, Princess Bea must now step in and honour the arranged marriage to a small kingdom prince. (2025)
As she enters a new chapter in her life, a bookstore owner finds love and purpose after agreeing to review a famous author's new novel. (2024)
After growing bored with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris, navigating romance, self-discovery and cheese amid the city of love's enchanting backdrop. (2024)
Since childhood, Betty has been cursed with romance, with all of her relationships ending in disaster. But after meeting Alex, she tries once more. Can true love break the curse? (2024)
With the promise of an inheritance from her grandfather spurring her, Emma promises to tutor a gifted violinist, unaware her grandfather is playing matchmaker from the grave. (2025)
The Island team meets their Mystery Mountain counterparts for a friendly murder game, but the fun ends with a murder in plain sight. (2025)
After being dumped and fired on the same day, Michelle is persuaded to attend a wellness and empowering program at a new retreat. Will she learn to Just Say Yes? (2023)
In this period adaptation of the Jane Austen classic, Marianne is torn between two potential suitors, while Elinor pines for a man beyond reach. Romantic drama. (2024)
A crime series actress returns to her home town where she encounters her first real case. Can her TV crime knowledge save the day? Mystery drama with Lyndie Greenwood. (2024)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
When Naima meets Damian after her interest in an undiscovered music group brings her to Nashville, their shared love of music blossoms into something more. (2023)
A single mum tracks down her daughter's biological father in a wild journey of trust, love and hope. As Ruby connects with her dad, could Amelia also be meeting the one? (2024)
When Olivia's dad is set to retire from their model-making firm, she thinks she will simply take over. Enter Simon, whose big picture thinking threatens to upend her plans. (2023)
Inspired by her father's legacy, Anya enters Finland's Joulurauha race. Partnered with a new dog, she faces challenges, her father's rival and her own anxieties. (2024)
Ex-dancer Luna pairs up with professional aerialist Bennet when he finds himself without a partner for the local arts festival. Soon, she faces the challenge of a lifetime. (2024)
After inheriting her grandmother's winery in Napa Valley, Cassandra takes a sabbatical to renovate the property with the help of handsome local, Alec. (2023)
An aspiring romance novelist wonders if she has been writing the wrong kinds of stories when she is shown the beauty of nature by a charming hotel owner on a retreat. (2022)
Redeeming Major League Baseball pitcher Diego's damaged reputation is a great career opportunity for publicist Hazel, but it's complicated: she and Diego have a past. (2023)
